CustomField.description: The Net AUM of the advisor, primarily calculated for compensation purposes.
CustomField.formula:
If( Not( OR( Isnull(Final_Compensation_Margin__c) , Final_Compensation_Margin__c = 0) ),
Final_Compensation_Margin__c * Underwritten_AUM__c,
IF(Advisor_Split__c=0, 0, (1- Advisor_Split__c ) * Underwritten_AUM__c) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The calculated Net AUM (NAUM) of the advisor.
CustomField.label: Margin AUM
